accommodations.text: Give a two-minute warning before transitions.
Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.
accommodations.source_quote: access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
Provide graphic organizers for writing and note-taking.
accommodations.source_quote: graphic organizers for writing and note-taking

accommodations.text: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: checklist to break long assignments into steps

accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: visual supports and models for new tasks

accommodations.text: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: check the daily planner before dismissal

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: accept a change in routine using a coping strategy

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information
